summary: Ran focused backend + frontend regression for revised grading/material/settings/class lifecycle/class-user management features on public URL. Backend endpoints passed; UI flows passed with one data-seeding gap and one non-blocking console warning.

integration_issues.issue: Demo seeded assignment 'Praktikum CRUD API' currently has material_id=null, so linked assignment section does not appear for seeded student Alya even though UI logic works when assignment.material_id matches material.id.

issues: Browser console shows invalid DOM nesting warning: <span> rendered inside <option> (hydration warning, currently non-blocking).

action_items: Backfill or migrate seeded demo assignment data so assignment.material_id matches a valid material.id for WEB4A1 demo student flow.
Fix invalid nested element in select/option rendering to remove hydration warning in console.
critical_code_review_comments: Revised feature implementation is generally correct; backend endpoint contracts are consistent and data-testid coverage is good.
Console warning indicates rendering artifact likely from instrumentation/wrapper inserting span within option; should still be corrected to prevent future hydration issues.
seed_data_creation: Created transient test data via APIs/UI: new course/class/materials/linked assignment, two test students, submissions, grading records, ended class state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use rev.student1.19f5f4fe@demo.id / Mahasiswa123! to verify positive linked-assignment student panel behavior (2 linked blocks confirmed). Demo seeded Alya account currently does not show linked block due to material_id null on seeded assignment.
rca of the issue: RCA for seeded-student linked assignment visibility: UI code filters linked assignments with strict condition assignment.material_id === material.id. For seeded Alya data, /api/assignments returns Praktikum CRUD API with material_id null while /api/materials returns Arsitektur Aplikasi Full-stack with id 161d4d75-0a97-42e2-8266-87144580a39b, so no match and no linked block renders. Mitigation: data migration/backfill for seeded assignment material_id or recreate seeded assignment with correct material link.
